title: Weird&Useless Creatures
description: This mod adds a lot of weird, sometimes useless, but sometimes really beautiful creatures.
body: ![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e2be65ff6ab38a1441434628639a65654f3cb85.png) This mod adds a lot of different creatures, items and other things to Minecraft! Some of them exist in real life, some were added just for fun, and some mobs were invented by author. List of mobs (Version 1.0.0) - Tea Fungus Slime - Jumping Fungus - Skyeye - Redstone Eel (IN DEVELOPMENT!!!) - Sacabambaspis - Xylophagus - Salamander - Coalfish - Spiny Mouse - Prehistoric Steve (IN DEVELOPMENT!!!) - Killifish - Rice Jellyfish
